concepts.name: Graph
concepts.short_definition: A collection of nodes (vertices) connected by edges.

concepts.name: Edge Weight
concepts.short_definition: A numerical value assigned to an edge, representing its cost or distance.

concepts.name: Spanning Tree
concepts.short_definition: A subgraph that connects all vertices of a graph without forming cycles.

concepts.name: Minimum Spanning Tree
concepts.short_definition: A spanning tree with the minimum possible total edge weight.

concepts.name: Disjoint Set Union
concepts.short_definition: A data structure that tracks a set of elements partitioned into a number of disjoint subsets.

concepts.name: Kruskal's Algorithm
concepts.short_definition: A greedy algorithm to find a Minimum Spanning Tree for a connected, undirected graph.

concepts.name: Greedy Approach
concepts.short_definition: Making the locally optimal choice at each stage with the hope of finding a global optimum.

concepts.name: Cycle Detection
concepts.short_definition: Identifying if adding an edge to a graph creates a cycle.

concepts.name: Sorting
concepts.short_definition: Arranging elements in a specific order, typically ascending or descending.

concepts.name: Connected Graph
concepts.short_definition: A graph where there is a path between every pair of vertices.
